description_long: This is a classical-style bust sculpture depicting the head and upper shoulders of a young male figure with curly hair. The facial features are finely detailed, with a slightly downward and sideways gaze, giving the expression a contemplative or introspective quality. The hair is rendered in voluminous, intricate curls, and the neck is elongated, leading to a squared-off base. The surface is predominantly white, with some visible blue discoloration or patina on the back and side of the neck. The bust is solid and appears to be made of plaster or marble, with a matte finish and subtle surface texture. The overall form is realistic and idealized, reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary.
description: A white classical bust of a young male with curly hair, detailed facial features, and a squared base. Subtle blue discoloration is visible on the back and side.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the detailed face, downward gaze, and intricate curls of the hair.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the head, neck, and visible blue discoloration on the neck and base.
description_view_2: Back-right view emphasizing the volume of the hair and the blue patina on the neck and shoulder.
description_view_3: Right profile view displaying the side of the face, the structure of the neck, and the squared base.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
